channel.title: Marvel on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Marvel on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Avengers Doomsday: RDJ Returns as Doctor Doom
item.description: Marvel reveals Avengers Doomsday featuring Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom in a chaotic clash between the X-Men, Fantastic Four, and Avengers.

item.title: Hulk Meets Punisher: Spider-Man's Deadliest Alliance
item.description: Marvel fans unite as Hulk and Punisher team up with Peter Parker in Spider-Man: Brand New Day, a game-changing trailer reveals a new alliance.
